zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Featherstone於大約1301年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德費亞黑斯東時，他的父親Thomas II de Featherstone28歲，母親Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux24歲。他於1338年與Isabel de Stanhope在英國英格蘭達勒姆斯坦普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1362年享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Featherstone于大约1301年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德費亞黑斯東时，他的父亲Thomas II de Featherstone28岁，母亲Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux24岁。他于1338年与Isabel de Stanhope在英国英格兰達勒姆斯坦普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1362年享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Featherstone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of the places in Staffordshire, Yorkshire, and Northumberland, which are so called from Old English fetherstān ‘tetralith’, a prehistoric structure consisting of three upright stones capped with a headstone (from Old English fe(o)ther- ‘four’ + stān ‘stone’).

variants.name: Featherson
meanings: English: variant of Featherstone with loss of -t-.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Featherstone was born about 1301, in Featherstone, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas II de Featherstone, was 28 and his mother, Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux, was 24. He married Isabel de Stanhope in 1338, in Stanhope, Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1362, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Featherstone est né environ 1301, à Featherstone, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas II de Featherstone, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Stanhope en 1338, à Stanhope, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1362, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Featherstone um 1301 in Featherstone, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas II de Featherstone 28 und seine Mutter Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux 24. Er hat 1338 in Stanhope, Durham, England, United Kingdom Isabel de Stanhope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1362 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Featherstone è nato il circa 1301 nel Featherstone, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas II de Featherstone, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Stanhope nel 1338, nel Stanhope, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1362, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Featherstoneが約1301年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドフエアスエルストーンで生まれた時，父Thomas II de Featherstoneは28歳，母Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneuxは24歳であった。1338年にイギリスイギリスダルハムスタンhオペでIsabel de Stanhopeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1362年に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Featherstone(이)가 대략 1301년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 피더스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas II de Featherstone(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1338년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 스탠홉에서 Isabel de Stanhope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1362년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Featherstone nasceu aproximadamente 1301, em Featherstone, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas II de Featherstone, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Stanhope em 1338, em Stanhope, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1362, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Featherstone родился около 1301 г. в местности фитирстоун, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas II de Featherstone было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Stanhope в 1338 г. в местности станоп, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1362 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Featherstone nació aproximadamente 1301, en Featherstone, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas II de Featherstone, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mariotta Ainsworth de Molyneux, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Isabel de Stanhope en 1338, en Stanhope, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1362, a la edad de 62 años.
